text:
On Wed, Nov 12, 2008 at 11:10 AM, John Baldwin <jhb@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Can you narrow down a specific DELAY() call in ATA that has
> a problem?

"Do we go 'on 10' or is it '9... 10.... GO!'?"

Attached is the minimal diff required to find the hard drive on a
PowerEdge 750 with the Intel 6300ESB SATA150 Controller.

-Corey Smith
